title: Ägir Sailing Dashboard
description: GPS telemetry: track, speed, heading, diagnostics

targets.query:
from(bucket: "agir")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_gps")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "lat" or r._field == "lon")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "lat", "lon"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> tail(n: 300)

from(bucket: "agir")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_gps")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "speed_kn")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "agir")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_gps")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "heading_deg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "agir")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_gps")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sats_used")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "agir")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_gps")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "alt_m")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "agir")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "hdop")

from(bucket: "agir")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "wind_speed_kn")

from(bucket: "agir")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_wind")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "wind_dir_deg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "agir")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_imu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "yaw_deg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "agir")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry_imu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pitch_deg")

from(bucket: "agir")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "roll_deg")
